name: Venison Jerky4
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the venison into strips 1/4 to 3/8 inch thick.
2. Mix the other ingredients together, and marinate the meat strips in it overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Drain and pat dry with a towel.
4. Place in smoker until the proper consistency is reached. Use only two or three pans of chips.
5. Store in covered jar or plastic bags.
